content.text:
I'm ready to help you explore and search your portfolio project! I'm in read-only mode, so I can help you:

- Find files using glob patterns
- Search code with regex patterns
- Read and analyze file contents
- Explore the directory structure
- Check git history and status

What would you like me to search for or analyze in your portfolio project at `/home/aryaniyaps/web-projects/portfolio`?
